items.final_wording: Supports documenting frailty score, nutrition and BMI, comorbidities, cognition, medicines, functional status, reassessment, and individualized shared decisions.

source.title: Guideline for Perioperative Care for People Living with Frailty Undergoing Elective and Emergency Surgery
source.population: Adults living with or at risk of frailty who are undergoing elective or emergency surgery.
source.setting: Referral, surgical outpatient, preoperative assessment, ward, theatre, recovery, discharge, and community transfer.
source.exclusions: Exact for frailty-status documentation, function, cognition, multimorbidity, medicines, nutrition, shared decisions, and review. It is partial for geriatric patients without established frailty; the scheduled review is overdue and UAE pathways remain local.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations for primary care, surgical outpatients, and preoperative assessment

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports documenting frailty score, nutrition and BMI, comorbidities, cognition, medicines, functional status, reassessment, and individualized shared decisions.

items.rationale: The frailty-specific section was reviewed but not mapped because geriatric age alone does not establish frailty.
